ddls:
CREATE TABLE "loans" (
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan */,
  "loan_amnt" REAL /* Total amount of the loan */,
  "funded_amnt" REAL /* Amount funded by the lender */,
  "funded_amnt_inv" REAL /* Amount invested by individual investors */,
  "term" TEXT /* Term of the loan in months */,
  "int_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate on the loan */,
  "installment" REAL /* Monthly installment amount */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Overall grade of the loan based on creditworthiness */,
  "sub_grade" TEXT /* Sub-grade classification */,
  "emp_length" TEXT /* Length of employment of the borrower */,
  "home_ownership" TEXT /* Home ownership status of the borrower */,
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the associated borrower */,
  "loan_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the loan */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan */,
  "loan_application_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan application was submitted */,
  "loan_disbursed_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan was disbursed */,
  "loan_due_date" TEXT /* Final due date for the loan */,
  "loan_balance" REAL /* Current balance of the loan */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the loan */,
  "loan_source" TEXT /* Source of the loan application */,
  "loan_risk_score" INTEGER /* Risk score of the loan based on borrower's creditworthiness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_loan_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loans_borrower_id FOREIGN KEY ("borrower_id") REFERENCES borrowers ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "borrowers" (
  "borrower_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each borrower */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the borrower */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the borrower */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the borrower */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the borrower */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the borrower */,
  "social_security" TEXT /* Social security number of the borrower */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the borrower */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of residence */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of residence */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* ZIP code of residence */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the borrower */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Current employment status */,
  "income" REAL /* Annual income of the borrower */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the borrower's loans */,
  "loan_count" INTEGER /* Number of loans the borrower has taken */,
  "total_loan_amount" REAL /* Total amount of loans the borrower has taken */,
  "overdue_loans" INTEGER /* Number of overdue loans the borrower has */,
  "late_payments" INTEGER /* Number of late payments the borrower has made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("borrower_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated loan */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Total payment amount made */,
  "principal_paid" REAL /* Amount of principal repaid */,
  "interest_paid" REAL /* Amount of interest repaid */,
  "late_fee" REAL /* Late fee charged if applicable */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_reference" TEXT /* Reference number for the payment */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the payment */,
  "payment_channel" TEXT /* Channel through which the payment was made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the status record */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated loan */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the loan */,
  "status_date" TEXT /* Date when the status was last updated */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the loan status */,
  "status_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the current status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_status_loan_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "recoveries" (
  "recovery_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each recovery action */,
  "loan_id" INTEGER /* ID of the associated loan */,
  "recovery_amount" REAL /* Total amount recovered from the borrower */,
  "recovery_date" TEXT /* Date of the recovery action */,
  "recovery_fee" REAL /* Fees associated with the recovery action */,
  "recovery_method" TEXT /* Method of recovery */,
  "recovery_status" TEXT /* Status of the recovery action */,
  "loan_officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the loan officer handling the recovery */,
  "recovered_principal" REAL /* Amount of principal recovered */,
  "recovered_interest" REAL /* Amount of interest recovered */,
  "recovery_notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments on the recovery action */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("recovery_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recoveries_loan_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_id") REFERENCES loans ("loan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_recoveries_loan_officer_id FOREIGN KEY ("loan_officer_id") REFERENCES loan_officers ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user account */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "loan_officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each loan officer */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User ID of the associated user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the loan officer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the loan officer */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Employee ID of the loan officer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the loan officer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the loan officer */,
  "hired_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan officer was hired */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the loan officer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_loan_officers_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lender_accounts" (
  "lender_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lender account */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the lender's account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lender */,
  "balance" REAL /* Current balance of the lender's account */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the lender account was created */,
  "last_transaction_date" TEXT /* Date of the last transaction */,
  "total_funded" REAL /* Total amount funded by the lender */,
  "total_recovered" REAL /* Total amount recovered from defaulted loans */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the lender account */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lender_id")
)
